items.title_en: Agency stole bestselling author's book, used AI to relaunch as their own
items.title_zh: 机构窃取畅销作者作品并用AI重新发布冒充自有作品
items.summary_en: An agency stole a bestselling author's book and used AI to relaunch it as its own work. The incident underscores how AI-enabled plagiarism can misappropriate someone’s voice and IP, and highlights the need for stronger provenance and anti-fraud controls in publishing.
items.summary_zh: 某机构窃取畅销作者的书籍，并利用AI以其名义重新发布。此事凸显了AI 支持的抄袭在知识产权方面的风险，也暴露出出版行业在作品溯源与防欺诈方面的薄弱点。

items.title_en: VPN ban update for UK households as government looks at 'age-gate'
items.title_zh: 英国家庭VPN禁令更新：政府在考虑设立“年龄门槛”
items.summary_en: The UK is updating its stance on household VPN use and weighing an age-gate policy to restrict access. If enacted, it would tighten controls on circumvention tech at home but raise concerns about privacy, enforcement, and effectiveness.
items.summary_zh: 政府正在更新对家庭使用 VPN 的规定，并考虑设立“年龄门槛”来限制访问。若落实，该举动将加强对家庭层面绕行工具的控制，同时引发对隐私、执法和有效性的质疑。

items.title_en: SMPTE Makes Its Standards Freely Accessible
items.title_zh: SMPTE 将标准免费开放访问，面向全球媒体技术社区
items.summary_en: SMPTE has opened its standards library to the public, removing paywalls for its technical specs. The move should accelerate interoperability and innovation across media tech, from streaming pipelines to device certification. It lowers barriers for startups and researchers to build compliant products.
items.summary_zh: SMPTE 将其技术标准库向全球开放获取，技术规范不再设有付费门槛。此举将促进媒体技术领域的互操作性与创新，覆盖从流媒体管线到设备认证的各个环节。降低初创公司和研究人员打造合规产品的门槛。

items.title_en: CSSQuake
items.title_zh: CSSQuake
items.summary_en: CSSQuake is a browser-based project that demonstrates CSS-driven visuals in a quake-inspired demo. It showcases how far CSS alone can push interactive, game-like experiences without heavy JavaScript.
items.summary_zh: CSSQuake 是一个在浏览器中展示 CSS 驱动视觉效果的 quake 风格演示。它展示了仅用 CSS 就能实现接近游戏体验的交互能力。

items.title_en: The ability to regrow body parts is dormant in mammals, not lost
items.title_zh: 哺乳动物的再生能力并非消失，而是处于休眠状态
items.summary_en: Mammals retain dormant regenerative capabilities; certain conditions could awaken tissue regeneration. This finding informs regenerative medicine research and points to potential approaches for organ and tissue repair.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示哺乳动物仍然保留着处于休眠状态的再生潜力，在特定条件下可能被唤醒。这一发现为再生医学研究提供线索，指向修复组织和器官的潜在治疗方法。

items.title_en: UHF X11: X11 Built for VisionOS and Apple Vision Pro
items.title_zh: UHF X11：为 VisionOS 与 Apple Vision Pro 构建的 X11 实现
items.summary_en: UHF X11 is an X11 implementation built for VisionOS and Apple Vision Pro. It enables running X11 apps in a spatial AR/VR context, lowering the barrier to port legacy Linux/Unix software to immersive devices. This could broaden toolchains for developers targeting Vision Pro.
items.summary_zh: UHF X11 是为 VisionOS 与 Apple Vision Pro 构建的 X11 实现。它使在空间化的 AR/VR 场景中运行 X11 应用成为可能，降低了将遗留的 Linux/Unix 软件迁移到沉浸式设备的门槛，为开发者构建 Vision Pro 的工具链带来可能性。

items.title_en: Windows 11 New Media Player Uses 3.5x More RAM, Charges for Popular Video Codecs
items.title_zh: Windows 11 新媒体播放器：内存占用猛增且对常用编解码器收费
items.summary_en: The new Windows 11 media player reportedly uses 3.5x more RAM and charges for popular video codecs, raising concerns about bloat and user-hostile licensing changes. Critics say it undermines performance promises and user choice.
items.summary_zh: 传闻中的新 Windows 11 媒体播放器 RAM 占用高出数倍，并对常用视频编解码器实施授权收费，引发对性能和许可策略的质疑。

items.title_en: Bun has an open PR adding shared-memory threads to JavaScriptCore
items.title_zh: Bun 在 JavaScriptCore 中为共享内存线程打开了 PR
items.summary_en: Bun, a web runtime, submitted an open PR to add shared-memory threading to JavaScriptCore. If merged, this could enable parallel execution across cores, potentially boosting performance for CPU-bound workloads and altering the WebKit/Bun ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Bun 这个网络运行时向 JavaScriptCore 提交了一个开放的 PR，旨在增加共享内存线程支持。若合并，可能实现跨核心的并行执行，提升 CPU 密集型工作负载的性能，并影响 WebKit 与 Bun 的生态。

items.title_en: DOS Game "F-15 Strike Eagle II" reversing project needs DOS test pilots
items.title_zh: DOS 游戏 F-15 Strike Eagle II 的逆向工程项目正在招募 DOS 测试玩家
items.summary_en: A reversing project for the DOS game F-15 Strike Eagle II is seeking 'DOS test pilots' to run tests in DOS environments. The effort aims to preserve the game's behavior and game logic for preservation and historical study.
items.summary_zh: 这款 DOS 游戏 F-15 Strike Eagle II 的逆向工程项目正在招募‘DOS 测试员’，在 DOS 环境中进行测试以还原游戏行为与逻辑，用于保护与研究之用。

items.title_en: Ember, a native iOS Hacker News reader I built around accessibility
items.title_zh: Ember：我为无障碍设计打造的原生 iOS Hacker News 阅读器
items.summary_en: Ember is a native iOS Hacker News reader focused on accessibility. It prioritizes VoiceOver compatibility, large tap targets, and clean reading modes, showing how accessible-first design can broaden who can consume tech news on mobile.
items.summary_zh: Ember 是一款原生 iOS 的 Hacker News 阅读器，聚焦无障碍体验。它优先考虑屏幕阅读器兼容性、易点击区域和简洁的阅读模式，展示了以无障碍为先的设计如何让更多人访问科技新闻。

items.title_en: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot has died in a plane crash
items.title_zh: 育碧联合创始人克洛德·吉耶莫特因飞机失事去世
items.summary_en: Claude Guillemot, a co-founder of Ubisoft, has died in a plane crash at age 69. He helped build Ubisoft into a global game publisher and his passing marks a notable moment in the industry.
items.summary_zh: 育碧共同创始人克洛德·吉耶莫特因飞机失事去世，享年69岁。他在帮助育碧从小型工作室发展成全球发行商的历程中扮演了关键角色，其离世对游戏行业是一次重大哀悼。

items.title_en: Iran says it's closing Strait of Hormuz, accusing Israel, US of violating truce
items.title_zh: 伊朗宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡，指控以色列与美国违反停火
items.summary_en: Iran claims to close the Strait of Hormuz and accuses Israel and the US of violating a truce. The move risks disrupting global oil shipments and heightens regional tensions.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗宣布关闭霍尔木兹海峡，指控以色列与美国违反停火。此举将增加全球原油运输中断的风险，并加剧区域紧张局势。

items.title_en: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn't stop anyone
items.title_zh: 从 PGP 到 Mythos：一种没有阻止任何人的出口管制简史
items.summary_en: A history of encryption export controls shows they rarely stop the spread of crypto and spyware; policy lags behind tech and often misses the mark, underscoring limits of regulation.
items.summary_zh: 回顾对加密和间谍软件的出口管制史，发现这些政策往往无法真正阻止相关技术的传播。法规往往落后于技术发展，且成效有限，凸显政策工具的局限性。

items.title_en: Show HN: StartupWiki – A Free Alternative to Crunchbase
items.title_zh: StartupWiki：Crunchbase 的免费替代品
items.summary_en: StartupWiki offers a free, community-maintained alternative to Crunchbase for startup data. By lowering access costs and potentially opening data, it could democratize startup intelligence, though data quality and coverage may vary.
items.summary_zh: StartupWiki 提供一个免费、由社区维护的创业公司数据替代 Crunchbase 的方案。降低获取成本、可能开放数据，有望让创业情报更具普及性，但数据质量与覆盖范围可能参差。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Due to spam on GitHub, what platforms can I move my projects?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：因为 GitHub 垃圾邮件问题，我可以把项目搬到哪些平台？
items.summary_en: Ask HN discusses alternatives to hosting code on GitHub amid spam issues. Community suggestions include GitLab, Sourcehut, Gitea, Bitbucket, and self-hosted options, weighing ecosystem maturity and security trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: Ask HN 讨论由于 GitHub 垃圾邮件问题，应该把项目迁移到哪些平台。社区建议包括 GitLab、Sourcehut、Gitea、Bitbucket 和自托管方案，并权衡生态成熟度与安全性取舍。

items.title_en: Hyundai buys Boston Dynamics
items.title_zh: 现代集团全面控股 Boston Dynamics
items.summary_en: Hyundai has completed securing full control of Boston Dynamics, with SoftBank exiting the stake for about $325 million. This move bets big on Hyundai’s robotics ambitions, signaling a push to integrate robot hardware, AI, and mobility platforms across its business units. Boston Dynamics gains a more stable automotive-aligned parent with resources to scale.
items.summary_zh: 现代集团完成对 Boston Dynamics 的全面控股，软银退出，交易额约3.25亿美元。这笔交易巩固了现代在机器人领域的长期野心，便于在其业务线里整合机器人硬件、人工智能与智能出行生态。

items.title_en: Where to Find the Colors Your Screen Can't Show You
items.title_zh: 屏幕显示不到的颜色在哪里可以找到
items.summary_en: Every display is limited by its color gamut, so some hues simply can't be shown. The article surveys ways to explore or approximate those beyond-screen colors—from spectral imaging and printing to perceptual color spaces like CIELAB—and explains why designers should think beyond sRGB. It also offers practical tips for communicating color intent when screens fall short.
items.summary_zh: 屏幕的颜色范围有限，某些色调无法在显示器上呈现。文章探讨如何接近或再现这些超出屏幕能力的颜色，涵盖分光成像、印刷，以及感知为基础的颜色空间（如CIELAB），并提供在屏幕受限时传达颜色意图的实用方法。

items.title_en: US Scientist John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
items.title_zh: 美国科学家 John Jumper 将离开 Google DeepMind 加入 Anthropic
items.summary_en: John Jumper, a leading AI researcher, is leaving DeepMind to join Anthropic, signaling a high-profile shift in AI safety leadership.
items.summary_zh: AI 领域知名研究者 John Jumper 将离开 Google DeepMind 转投 Anthropic，标志着 AI 安全研究领域的高层人事变动。

items.title_en: Lithuanian startup launches open-source network to detect Shahed-type drones
items.title_zh: 立陶宛初创公司推出开源网络以检测 Shahed 型无人机
items.summary_en: A Lithuanian startup launches an open-source network to detect Shahed-type drones, inviting researchers and communities to contribute sensors and detections. It exemplifies crowdsourced defense tech and open standards in unmanned systems.
items.summary_zh: 立陶宛一家初创企业推出开源网络，用于检测 Shahed 型无人机，鼓励社区共享传感器和检测数据。这体现了以开源和众包方式提升无人机监测能力的趋势。

items.title_en: I Stored a Website in a Favicon
items.title_zh: 我把一个网站存进了 favicon
items.summary_en: An experimental piece shows you can encode a website's data into a favicon and retrieve it later. It probes the limits of favicon-based storage, browser caching, and decoding, turning a tiny image into a surprisingly capable data channel. Practical uses are limited, but the exercise yields lessons about data density, security, and edge-case behavior.
items.summary_zh: 作者通过把网站数据编码到 favicon 中并解码还原，展示了在极小的图标中也能承载大量信息的可能性。文章分析浏览器缓存、数据 URI 与解码的限制，以及这种非常规数据通道在实用性和安全性上的含义。

items.title_en: Norway imposes near ban on AI in elementary school
items.title_zh: 挪威对小学生使用AI几近全面禁令
items.summary_en: Norway is moving toward a near-ban on AI use in elementary schools, tightening rules on what students and teachers can access on school devices. The policy underscores safety concerns and data privacy while grappling with how to responsibly integrate AI into early education.
items.summary_zh: 挪威正推动对小学生在校使用AI的几近全面禁令，严格限制师生在校设备上的AI工具使用。此举凸显对安全与数据隐私的关注，以及在早教阶段如何负责任地引入AI的权衡。

items.title_en: Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI Agents
items.title_zh: 为 AI 代理提供的临时 Cloudflare 账户
items.summary_en: Cloudflare introduces temporary accounts designed for AI agents, with time-limited lifespans and scoped permissions. The feature lowers setup friction for automated agents while preserving governance and security controls.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出临时账户，供 AI 代理使用，账户按时限和权限范围进行管理。此举降低了自动化接入门槛，同时保持治理与安全边界。

items.title_en: Bootimus – A Self-Contained PXE and HTTP Boot Server
items.title_zh: Bootimus：一款自包含的 PXE 与 HTTP 引导服务器
items.summary_en: Bootimus provides a compact, self-contained PXE/HTTP boot server ideal for network booting without external services. It's handy for bare-metal provisioning, offline labs, and reproducible deployments.
items.summary_zh: Bootimus 提供一个紧凑、独立的 PXE/HTTP 引导服务器，适合在无需外部服务的情况下进行网络引导。它在裸机部署、离线实验室和可复现的测试环境中很有用，体现了便携工具的趋势。

items.title_en: Bobby Prince, composer for Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Duke Nukem 3D, has died
items.title_zh: 悼念 Doom、Wolfenstein 3D 与 Duke Nukem 3D 作曲家 Bobby Prince
items.summary_en: Bobby Prince, the composer behind iconic soundtracks for Doom, Wolfenstein 3D, and Duke Nukem 3D, has died. His work helped define the sound of early FPS games and remains influential in game music history.
items.summary_zh: 为《毁灭战士》、Duke Nukem 3D 等经典游戏创作配乐的作曲家Bobby Prince去世。他的音乐塑造了早期FPS游戏的声音风格，并持续影响着游戏音乐史。

items.title_en: Vacation With An Artist – Mini-Apprenticeships with Artists in Their Studios
items.title_zh: Vacation With An Artist：在艺术家工作室的迷你学徒制
items.summary_en: Vacation With An Artist offers mini-apprenticeships where visitors learn directly in artists’ studios. The model blends travel with hands-on creative mentorship, supporting artists while giving patrons deeper immersion in the creative process.
items.summary_zh: Vacation With An Artist 提供在艺术家工作室进行的短期学徒制，游客可以亲身学习并获得导师指导。这种模式把旅行与创意实践结合起来，既支持艺术家，也让参与者深入体验创作过程。

items.title_en: Google workspace threatening to block Firefox access
items.title_zh: Google Workspace 可能阻止 Firefox 访问
items.summary_en: If true, Google Workspace blocking Firefox would raise questions about browser compatibility and vendor lock-in in enterprise tools. It would push users toward Chromium-based ecosystems and complicate privacy-focused setups. The broader signal is about how much control platforms exert over client access.
items.summary_zh: 若属实，Google Workspace 可能阻断 Firefox 访问，将引发对企业工具中的浏览器兼容性与厂商锁定的讨论。这会推动用户转向以 Chromium 为核心的生态，并影响偏好隐私的工作环境。

items.title_en: Court Records Should Be Free
items.title_zh: 法院记录应免费开放
items.summary_en: EFF argues that court records should be freely accessible and machine-readable to improve transparency, research, and accountability. The movement pushes for open court data standards and reduces friction for journalists, researchers, and the public.
items.summary_zh: EFF 呼吁法院记录应免费向公众开放并可机器可读，以提升透明度、研究和问责。倡导建立公开的法院数据标准，降低记者、研究者和公众的使用成本。

items.title_en: There are no instances in ATProto
items.title_zh: ATProto 中不存在实例概念
items.summary_en: ATProto’s architecture is often misunderstood as having 'instances'. The author argues there are no such isolated 'instances' in ATProto because federation uses accounts and servers differently, emphasizing interoperability and same-identity across servers. This reframes how developers should think about hosting and moderation in ATProto.
items.summary_zh: ATProto 的架构常被误解为‘实例’概念。作者指出在 ATProto 的联邦模型里并不存在真正的‘实例’，强调跨服务器的互操作性和统一身份的重要性，这对开发者在托管与 moderation 上的思路有显著影响。

items.title_en: GPT-5.5 hallucinates 3x more than MIT-licensed GLM-5.2
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 的幻觉比 MIT 许可的 GLM-5.2 高出 3 倍
items.summary_en: A practical comparison shows GPT-5.5 hallucinates far more than GLM-5.2, raising reliability concerns for next-gen models.
items.summary_zh: 评测显示，在相同条件下，GPT-5.5 的幻觉率比 MIT 许可的 GLM-5.2 高出约三倍，这让人担忧大模型的可靠性。文中讨论可能的原因，以及这对依赖对话型助手的开发者意味着什么。

items.title_en: How many of the 170k English words do you know?
items.title_zh: 你认识多少个约17万的英语单词？
items.summary_en: A playful tool invites you to estimate how many English words you know from a list of about 170k, highlighting vocabulary size and variation among readers. It illustrates why fluency relies on context and frequency as much as memorization.
items.summary_zh: 一款有趣的工具让你在约17万单词的清单中估算自己的词汇量，揭示不同读者之间的差异。它说明了流利程度更多依赖上下文与词频，而非记住所有单词。

items.title_en: Web Browsers on PDAS
items.title_zh: 在 PDA 上的网页浏览器
items.summary_en: A look back at experiments to run web browsers on PDAs reveals the severe constraints of early mobile devices. The discussion highlights how memory, CPU, and storage limits shaped the first mobile web and set the stage for today’s browsers.
items.summary_zh: 回顾在 PDA 上运行网页浏览器的尝试，揭示早期移动设备的资源限制——内存、CPU、存储的约束如何塑造了最初的移动网页体验，并奠定今日浏览器的演进。

items.title_en: Satellite reveals immense scale of GPS signal tampering
items.title_zh: 卫星揭示 GPS 信号篡改的惊人规模
items.summary_en: A satellite-based analysis shows GPS signal tampering at a much larger scale than previously thought, raising concerns about navigation integrity for aviation, maritime, and mobile devices. The piece underscores the need for robust PNT (positioning, navigation, timing) and potential encrypted alternatives.
items.summary_zh: 卫星数据揭示 GPS 信号篡改的规模远超先前认知，威胁航空、海上导航与日常设备的定位准确性。强调需要更具鲁棒性的定位导航时钟系统，并探讨替代方案或加密信号的可行性。

items.title_en: Project Valhalla, Explained: How a Decade of Work Arrives in JDK 28
items.title_zh: Valhalla 项目解读：十年研发在 JDK 28 落地
items.summary_en: Project Valhalla brings value types and specialized generics to the JVM, enabling compact, allocation-free data representations and faster APIs. This explainer frames the decade-long effort, the tradeoffs involved, and what JDK 28 users can expect in terms of performance, memory efficiency, and backward compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Valhalla 将为 JVM 引入值类型与专用泛型，带来更紧凑、无分配的数据表示和更快的 API。本文梳理了十余年的实现过程、设计取舍，以及 JDK 28 用户在性能、内存效率和向后兼容性方面将看到的变化。

items.title_en: Cargo-Geiger
items.title_zh: Cargo-Geiger：用于检测 Rust 依赖中不安全代码的工具
items.summary_en: Cargo-Geiger is a cargo subcommand that scans a project's dependencies for unsafe blocks, helping teams audit safety across crates. It highlights Rust's safety challenges in the ecosystem and encourages safer coding practices in the ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Cargo-Geiger 是一个用于 Rust 的 cargo 子命令，能够扫描依赖中的不安全代码，帮助团队定位和量化安全风险。该工具凸显了Rust 生态中的安全挑战并推动更安全的编程实践。

items.title_en: Bill Gates on Steve Jobs
items.title_zh: 比尔·盖茨谈史蒂夫·乔布斯
items.summary_en: Bill Gates' remarks on Steve Jobs reflect on their respective legacies, underscoring how Jobs shaped product design and the culture of Silicon Valley, even as Gates built Windows and Microsoft.
items.summary_zh: 比尔·盖茨对史蒂夫·乔布斯的评价折射出二人各自的遗产，强调乔布斯对产品设计和硅谷文化的塑造，即使盖茨主导着微软的路线。

items.title_en: A new bill takes aim at government pressure to silence lawful online speech
items.title_zh: 新法案瞄准政府压制合法在线言论
items.summary_en: The proposed bill would curb government pressure on platforms to remove lawful online speech, establishing clearer standards, transparency, and redress. It signals a legislative push to protect free expression online while still addressing harm online through targeted tools and accountability.
items.summary_zh: 新法案拟限制政府对平台施压，要求对合法在线言论的删除设定清晰标准并提高透明度和救济途径。此举旨在保护网络表达自由，同时为治理网络有害内容提供更有针对性的工具与问责机制。

items.title_en: Hey, n00b, we didn't hire you to complete tasks
items.title_zh: 嘿，新手，我们不是让你把任务全做完的
items.summary_en: A pragmatic note arguing against overloading junior developers with every task, stresses mentorship, sustainable pace, and healthy delegation. It advocates balancing hands-on work with learning and collaboration to maintain quality.
items.summary_zh: 这篇简讯反对把每一项任务都推给新手，主张通过指导、合理分工和可持续的工作节奏来提高团队效率。强调团队应在动手编码与共同协作之间取得平衡，以维持代码质量与学习成长。

items.title_en: LLMs Are Complicated Now
items.title_zh: 如今的语言模型变得更复杂
items.summary_en: LLMs have grown more complex, driven by plugins, memory, multi-model capabilities, and safety controls. The post argues that this complexity demands new tooling and evaluation frameworks to understand and govern how these models are used in practice.
items.summary_zh: 如今的语言模型变得更加复杂，插件、记忆、跨模态能力与安全控制叠加提升了应用难度。文章强调需要新的评估框架和工具链来理解、比较并安全地使用这类系统。

items.title_en: I found 10k GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware
items.title_zh: 我发现一万多个 GitHub 仓库在分发木马恶意软件
items.summary_en: A collection of about 10,000 GitHub repositories distributing Trojan malware highlights the scale of malware hosted on code platforms. It underscores the importance of supply-chain security and rigorous review of dependencies when building software.
items.summary_zh: 大约一万多个 GitHub 仓库被发现用于传播木马恶意软件，揭示代码托管平台上恶意分发的规模。这凸显了在构建软件时加强供应链安全和依赖审查的重要性。

items.title_en: How to feed a dictator
items.title_zh: 如何喂养独裁者（电影）
items.summary_en: The film examines the politics of aid and diplomacy under authoritarian regimes, revealing tactics and ethics of feeding dictatorial leaders. It analyzes how international aid, bargaining, and public perception shape power, offering warnings for policymakers and development practitioners.
items.summary_zh: 影片聚焦在专制政权下的援助与外交政治，揭示喂养独裁者背后的策略与伦理。通过分析国际援助、谈判与舆论对权力的影响，为决策者与发展工作者提供警示。

items.title_en: Think of the children: How to force real ID for all internet traffic (2023)
items.title_zh: 让所有互联网流量强制 Real ID 的构想（2023）
items.summary_en: The piece critiques proposals to require Real ID for all internet traffic, arguing it would enable pervasive surveillance and infringe civil liberties while complicating technical implementation. It emphasizes the risk of chilling effects and overreach.
items.summary_zh: 批评将 Real ID 强制用于所有互联网流量的构想，认为这会带来广泛监控、侵害隐私并增加实施难度，同时可能产生寒蝉效应与过度集成。

items.title_en: The European Social Stack
items.title_zh: 欧洲社交栈
items.summary_en: Europe aims to build a privacy-preserving social stack to reduce reliance on US platforms and enable interoperable services. The approach envisions common standards for identity, data portability, and moderation to empower European developers and users.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲正推进一个以隐私为核心的统一社交栈，旨在减少对美大平台的依赖并实现服务互通。该方案提出在身份、数据可携带性和内容管理等方面的通用标准，以帮助欧洲开发者和用户。

items.title_en: Show HN: We post-trained a model that pen tests instead of refusing
items.title_zh: Show HN：后训练的模型倾向于进行渗透测试而非拒绝
items.summary_en: It raises dual-use concerns and questions how such tools should be governed, but also hints at potential automation of security testing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 该帖子介绍了一种对模型进行后续训练后，倾向于执行渗透测试而非因安全原因拒绝的做法。这引发双重用途的担忧，并提出对这类工具治理的讨论，同时也暗示了安全测试流程自动化的潜在可能。

items.title_en: Pong in S Favicon
items.title_zh: 在 Favicon 中实现 Pong
items.summary_en: A playful project embeds a playable Pong game inside a website favicon, pushing the boundaries of tiny-form web graphics and showing off clever encoding tricks.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的项目把可运行的 Pong 放进网站的 favicon，展示超小型网页图形的创意与技巧。

items.title_en: Big Banana Car
items.title_zh: 大香蕉车
items.summary_en: Showcases a whimsical 'Big Banana Car' project, merging art car culture with design experimentation. It demonstrates how playful builds can spark conversation about vehicle customization.
items.summary_zh: 展示了“Big Banana Car”的玩趣项目，将艺术车文化与设计实验相结合，展示了富有趣味的定制车如何激发关于车辆改造的讨论。

items.title_en: Surprising economics of load-balanced systems
items.title_zh: 负载均衡系统的出人意料的经济学
items.summary_en: The article reveals counterintuitive cost dynamics in load-balanced systems, where scaling, replication, and idle capacity interact in surprising ways. It discusses how architectural choices impact total cost of ownership and performance for distributed services.
items.summary_zh: 文章揭示负载均衡系统中的意外成本动态，扩展、复制与空闲容量之间的相互作用出人意料。讨论了架构选择如何影响分布式服务的总体拥有成本与性能。

items.title_en: The AirPods Effect
items.title_zh: AirPods 效应
items.summary_en: The AirPods effect reshaped consumer expectations around wireless audio, battery life, and device interoperability. It spurred rapid adoption of true wireless design, influenced accessory ecosystems, and shifted how tech brands think about on-device interactions.
items.summary_zh: AirPods 效应改变了消费者对无线音频、续航与设备互操作性的预期，推动了真无线设计的快速普及并影响周边生态。它也促使厂商重新思考设备交互的设计与生态策略。

items.title_en: John Jumper to join Anthropic
items.title_zh: John Jumper 将加入 Anthropic
items.summary_en: John Jumper joins Anthropic, signaling a boost in AI safety talent and expertise at the startup. The move could influence research directions and safety culture.
items.summary_zh: John Jumper 将加入 Anthropic，标志着该初创公司在 AI 安全领域的人才与专长的增强，可能影响研究方向与安全文化。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Will programmers write more efficient code during the memory shortage?
items.title_zh: 内存短缺时，程序员会写出更高效的代码吗？
items.summary_en: The discussion surveys whether memory scarcity pushes developers toward more memory-efficient patterns, such as streaming data, in-place algorithms, and careful resource management. It weighs evidence from practice and experiments, noting that efficiency gains can trade readability or development speed for memory footprint.
items.summary_zh: 讨论探讨在内存紧张的情形下，开发者是否会倾向于更高效的内存使用策略，如流式处理、就地算法和更谨慎的资源管理。分析来自实践的证据，指出优化可能以降低可读性与执行速度换取更小的内存占用为代价。

items.title_en: Zenzizenzizenzic
items.title_zh: Zenzizenzizenzic：八次方的古名与趣味
items.summary_en: Explains the quirky historical term zenzizenzizenzic for the eighth power, tracing its origin and how such playful nomenclature fits into the history of mathematics. A charming math curiosity.
items.summary_zh: 解释八次方的古老术语 zenzizenzizenzic，追溯其起源并展示这类趣味命名在数学史中的地位。

items.title_en: Ubiquiti: Enterprise NAS, Built on ZFS
items.title_zh: Ubiquiti：企业级 NAS，基于 ZFS
items.summary_en: Ubiquiti announces an enterprise NAS built on ZFS, emphasizing data integrity, snapshots, and scalable storage for SMBs. The product signals growing interest in software-defined storage among cost-conscious businesses.
items.summary_zh: Ubiquiti 推出基于 ZFS 的企业级 NAS，强调数据完整性、快照功能与可扩展存储，面向中小企业。此举显示成本敏感型企业对软件定义存储兴趣上升。

items.title_en: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP
items.title_zh: MCP 的零触控 OAuth
items.summary_en: Zero-Touch OAuth for MCP introduces an enterprise-friendly OAuth flow that provisions tokens and apps with minimal human intervention. It emphasizes automated onboarding, device registration, and policy-driven access controls to reduce friction while preserving security. This approach helps large organizations deploy cloud-native apps faster without compromising governance.
items.summary_zh: 零触控 OAuth 为 MCP 提供面向企业的简化认证流程，尽量减少人工配置即可完成令牌和应用的注册。强调自动化的上线流程、设备注册与基于策略的访问控制，在降低运维成本的同时保持安全性。对于需要快速部署云原生应用的大型组织尤为重要。

items.title_en: AURpocalypse now: a look at the recent AUR attacks
items.title_zh: AURpocalypse：近期的 AUR 攻击回顾
items.summary_en: AURpocalypse examines recent attacks on the Arch User Repository ecosystem, highlighting supply-chain risk and the importance of package verification, trust, and community vigilance.
items.summary_zh: AURpocalypse 回顾了最近对 Arch 用户仓库生态的攻击，强调供应链风险以及包签名与社区监督的重要性。

items.title_en: The UK's new under-16 social media ban will cause more harm than it prevents
items.title_zh: 英国未满16岁社媒禁令将弊大于利
items.summary_en: Britain plans to block or restrict social media access for under-16s, with platforms bearing penalties for non-compliance. Critics warn the policy may push teens toward unregulated spaces, undermining safety benefits and raising privacy concerns.
items.summary_zh: 英国拟对未满16岁的用户实施社交媒体访问限制，违规平台将面临处罚。批评者认为此举可能促使青少年转向未监管的区域，削弱安全效益并引发隐私问题。

items.title_en: The rise of South Korea’s weapons business
items.title_zh: 韩国武器产业的崛起
items.summary_en: South Korea’s weapons business is expanding, driven by defense exports and regional demand. The rise reshapes global arms markets and highlights Korea's tech prowess in advanced materials, avionics, and precision manufacturing.
items.summary_zh: 韩国的武器产业正在扩张，受到军事出口和区域需求推动。这一崛起重塑全球军火市场，凸显韩国在高端材料、航空电子和精密制造等领域的技术实力。

items.title_en: Race Against Time to Save Brixton Market from Private Equity
items.title_zh: 拯救布里克斯顿市场：与私募股权的时间赛跑
items.summary_en: Community activists race against time to save Brixton Market from private equity influence; the piece highlights threats to local, community-owned spaces and the need for policy or philanthropic intervention.
items.summary_zh: 社区活动家正与时间赛跑，试图拯救布里克斯顿市场免受私募股权影响。报道强调地方社群空间的危机以及需要政策或慈善干预。

items.title_en: W Social, public institutions and the theater of European digital sovereignty
items.title_zh: W Social、公共机构与欧洲数字主权的舞台
items.summary_en: The piece argues that public institutions and platforms like W Social shape Europe’s digital sovereignty narrative, highlighting governance, data governance, and the performative politics around sovereignty. It critiques how rhetoric often masks underlying regulatory tensions.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨像 W Social 这样的平台与公共机构在欧洲数字主权话语中的角色，聚焦治理、数据主权以及主权话语背后的张力。作者指出表述往往掩盖了现实中的监管冲突与政治博弈。

items.title_en: New (Old) 3D Golf: Porting PC-9801 and Virtual Boy to Mega Drive
items.title_zh: 新（旧）3D 高尔夫：将 PC-9801 与 Virtual Boy 端到 Mega Drive
items.summary_en: A retro-ports project recreates a 3D golf game for the Mega Drive by porting from PC-9801 and Virtual Boy, showcasing the quirks and creativity of old-hardware porting.
items.summary_zh: 一个复古爱好者项目将 3D 高尔夫从 PC-9801 和 Virtual Boy 移植到 Mega Drive，体现跨硬件移植的挑战与创意。

items.title_en: Can you see three trees?
items.title_zh: 你能看到三棵树吗？
items.summary_en: This piece examines a visual puzzle that asks viewers to spot three trees, using it to explore perceptual biases and the limits of detection. It sheds light on how humans differ from AI vision systems in parsing ambiguous scenes, with implications for computer vision datasets and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个让人想看看是否能在图像中识别出三棵树的视觉谜题，揭示感知偏差与察觉极限。讨论人类视觉与人工智能在解析模糊场景方面的差异，以及这对计算机视觉数据集和评估的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gerrymandle - Daily puzzle game where you redraw electoral districts
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gerrymandle - 每日拼图游戏，你重新绘制选区
items.summary_en: Show HN: Gerrymandle is a daily puzzle game where you redraw electoral districts, combining map geometry with strategic play. It’s a playful exploration of political geography and algorithmic design.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Gerrymandle 是一款每日拼图游戏，让你重新绘制选区，结合地图几何与策略玩法。它以有趣的方式展现了政治地理与算法设计。

items.title_en: Building a robotics research setup that lives next to my desk
items.title_zh: 放在桌边的机器人研究系统
items.summary_en: A compact robotics research setup sits near the author’s desk, emphasizing modular hardware and accessible control software for rapid experimentation. The setup illustrates how small, affordable rigs can accelerate learning and prototype iteration in robotics research.
items.summary_zh: 桌边的小型机器人研究系统强调模块化硬件和易用的控制软件，便于快速进行实验与迭代。此类桌旁工作流展示了在机器人研究中，用低成本设备加速学习与原型开发的可行性。

items.title_en: DuckDB Internals Part 1
items.title_zh: DuckDB 内部实现：第一部分
items.summary_en: An introductory look into DuckDB's internals, covering architecture, storage layout, and query execution approach. The post sets the stage for deeper dives into its columnar engine and optimization tricks.
items.summary_zh: DuckDB 内部实现的入门分析，涵盖架构、存储布局与查询执行方式，为后续对其列式引擎与优化技巧的深入探讨奠定基础。

items.title_en: Cirrus: ATProto Personal Data Server That Runs on Cloudflare Workers
items.title_zh: Cirrus：在 Cloudflare Workers 上运行的 ATProto 个人数据服务器
items.summary_en: Cirrus is a personal data server for AT Protocol that runs on Cloudflare Workers, enabling users to host their own data with decentralized protocol support. It demonstrates feasibility and limits of edge runtimes for personal data sovereignty, including storage and privacy tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: Cirrus 是一个在 Cloudflare Workers 上运行的 AT Protocol 个人数据服务器，允许用户在边缘计算环境中托管自己的数据，并支持去中心化协议。它展示了边缘运行时在个人数据主权方面的可行性与局限性，以及存储和隐私权衡。

items.title_en: Designing a backyard deck for my house
items.title_zh: 为自家后院设计露台
items.summary_en: An approachable DIY deck design guide for a home project. It covers site assessment, material choices, structural considerations, and safety, plus budgeting tips and maintenance notes to help turn a back yard into a durable, pleasant outdoor space.
items.summary_zh: 分享自家后院设计露台的实用要点：场地布局、材料选择、结构安全以及防护考虑。文中还给出预算、维护和与房屋风格协调的建议，帮助把露台设计落地。

items.title_en: "Career coaches" are fear-farming the Stanford AI hiring study [debunk]
items.title_zh: 职业教练在斯坦福 AI 招聘研究中的恐惧营销被揭穿
items.summary_en: A debunking piece argues that some career coaches exploited concerns about Stanford's AI hiring study to push services, misrepresenting the study's findings. It emphasizes sticking to data-driven insights over fear-based marketing.
items.summary_zh: 一篇辟谣文章揭露一些职业教练利用对斯坦福 AI 招聘研究的担忧来煽动市场的做法，强调应以数据驱动而非恐惧营销来解读研究结论。

items.title_en: How Japan's railways stayed one while splitting apart
items.title_zh: 日本铁路在分拆中如何保持统一
items.summary_en: An exploration of how Japan's railways preserved a unified national identity despite privatization into independent JR companies. The article delves into branding choices, logo consistency, and cross-network coordination that kept the system feeling cohesive.
items.summary_zh: 探讨日本铁路在分拆成多家独立公司后，如何保持统一的国家形象。文章聚焦品牌策略、标志的一致性，以及跨网络协作，维持系统的连贯感。

items.title_en: A Perceptron in Age of Empires II
items.title_zh: 在《帝国时代 II》中实现感知机
items.summary_en: The post shows how a simple perceptron can be mapped into the game’s logic circuits, effectively simulating a tiny neural net inside AoE2 setups. It discusses wiring, training, and limitations, illustrating how classic ML concepts can be demonstrated in a game environment.
items.summary_zh: 文章演示如何将一个简单的感知机映射到游戏的电路逻辑中，在《帝国时代 II》的设定里模拟一个小型神经网络。内容涵盖连线、训练与局限性，展示了经典机器学习概念如何在游戏环境中得到直观体现。

items.title_en: MiniMax M3 vs. GLM 5.2: Codegen comparison across autonomous coding tasks
items.title_zh: MiniMax M3 与 GLM 5.2：自治编码任务的代码生成对比
items.summary_en: A benchmark comparing two AI code-generation models on autonomous coding tasks, highlighting where each model excels and providing guidance on deployment decisions.
items.summary_zh: 对 MiniMax M3 与 GLM 5.2 在自治编码任务上的代码生成能力进行对比，揭示各自的优势并为部署决策提供指引。

items.title_en: Why has the pointe shoe been so resistant to change?
items.title_zh: 为何 pointe 鞋在变革上如此迟缓？
items.summary_en: This piece explains why pointe shoes have resisted modernisation, highlighting safety concerns, tradition, and manufacturing constraints that slow adoption of new designs.
items.summary_zh: 本文解释了 pointe 鞋为何难以实现现代化，强调安全性、传统观念和制造工艺的限制导致新设计的采用进展缓慢。

items.title_en: Ten years of ClickHouse in open source
items.title_zh: ClickHouse 开源十年回顾
items.summary_en: A decade of open-source development has shaped ClickHouse into a high-performance, columnar analytics engine with a thriving community.
items.summary_zh: 十年的开源开发让 ClickHouse 成为高性能的列式分析引擎，并拥有活跃的社区。文章回顾了关键里程碑、治理演变，以及早期架构选择如何推动在各行业的广泛采用。

items.title_en: Zen and the Art of Machine Learning Research
items.title_zh: 机器学习研究的禅意与艺术
items.summary_en: ML research benefits from simplicity, reproducibility, and deliberate iteration rather than hype. This piece argues for a mindful approach to experimentation, open data, and robust evaluation to advance reliable models.
items.summary_zh: 机器学习研究应追求简洁、可重复性与有目的的迭代，而非追逐热度。文章主张用心对待实验设计、开放数据与稳健评估，以推动更可靠的模型。

items.title_en: Data Compression Explained (2012)
items.title_zh: 数据压缩解释（2012）
items.summary_en: This classic explainer distills core ideas in data compression: entropy, coding, and models, with approachable examples. It contrasts practical algorithms like LZ and arithmetic coding and discusses the trade-offs between compression ratio, speed, and memory usage. The piece helps readers appreciate why compression remains a balance between theory and engineering.
items.summary_zh: 这篇经典文章梳理了数据压缩的核心原理，包括熵、编码方案和统计模型，并通过直观示例帮助读者理解。它对比了常用算法如 LZ 与算术编码，并讨论了压缩比、速度与内存开销之间的权衡，揭示了压缩领域的挑战与魅力。

items.title_en: The discovery that changed how scientists think about memory
items.title_zh: 改变科学家记忆观的发现（IBM）
items.summary_en: The Kavli Prize-recognized finding reshapes how scientists view memory, suggesting memory relies on distributed networks rather than isolated storage.
items.summary_zh: 这项获得 Kavli 奖的发现改变了科学家对记忆的理解，提示记忆可能分散在大脑网络中而非单一存储单元。它对神经科学、衰老研究和受 AI 启发的记忆模型具有深远影响，推动对记忆障碍的新策略。

items.title_en: We built a lab to evaluate data agents – Hex
items.title_zh: 我们建立了一个实验室来评估数据代理——Hex
items.summary_en: Hex describes building a lab to evaluate data agents, outlining a framework for benchmarking, tasks, and metrics. Early findings reveal where current data-agent designs excel and where they stumble, informing best practices for tooling and governance.
items.summary_zh: Hex 构建了一个评估数据代理的实验室，提出了基准框架、任务与评测指标。初步结果揭示当前代理在工具使用、鲁棒性和可靠性方面的优势与不足，为后续工具和治理提供参考。

items.title_en: Telescope Ranchers
items.title_zh: 望远镜牧场主
items.summary_en: An evocative look at ranchers who embrace astronomy as a core part of life, showing how wide-open skies and remote environment foster unique stargazing practices. The piece contrasts traditional ranching with modern observational tech, shedding light on how rural communities contribute to science culture.
items.summary_zh: 这篇报道讲述把天文学融入牧场生活的牧场主们，辽阔夜空和偏远环境让观星成为独特的日常。文本对比了传统牧场与现代观测技术，揭示偏远社区如何为科学文化添入一抹独特风景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Metiq: a real time 3D globe for 100 public datasets
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个实时的三维地球仪，用于可视化100个公开数据集
items.summary_en: Metiq offers a real-time 3D globe visualization for a hundred public datasets, enabling fast, immersive exploration of geo-annotated data. Built for developers, it demonstrates how WebGL and streaming data can empower interactive data storytelling.
items.summary_zh: Metiq 提供一个实时的三维地球仪，用于可视化100个公开数据集，便于对地理标注数据进行沉浸式探索。面向开发者的工具展示了 WebGL 与数据流在互动数据讲述中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Egyptian Fractions (2006)
items.title_zh: 埃及分数：将分数表示为单位分数的历史与方法
items.summary_en: A mathematical look at Egyptian fractions, expressing rationals as sums of distinct unit fractions. The piece traces historical context, simple algorithms, and how these representations relate to number theory.
items.summary_zh: 对埃及分数进行数学探讨，将有理数表示为互不相同的单位分数之和，追溯历史背景、简单算法及与数论的关系。

items.title_en: A 1969 camera operators' strike created Upstairs Downstairs multiverse
items.title_zh: 1969 年摄影机操作员罢工催生的 Upstairs Downstairs 平行宇宙
items.summary_en: During a 1969 strike by camera operators, TV production color handling diverged, effectively creating multiple visual variants of Upstairs, Downstairs. The piece uses this historical quirk to illustrate how production constraints can shape archival color and viewer perception, producing a kind of 'color multiverse' in classic television.
items.summary_zh: 1969 年摄影机操作员罢工影响了电视制作，导致 Upstairs, Downstairs 出现了不同版本的色彩处理，形成视觉上的‘平行宇宙’。文章借此历史趣事揭示制作约束如何影响档案色彩与观众感知，以及色彩在电视史中的作用。

items.title_en: The Cold War's Accidental Whale Observatory
items.title_zh: 冷战时期的意外鲸鱼观测站
items.summary_en: Long-baseline acoustic arrays built to track Soviet submarines accidentally yielded whale data, enabling scientists to study migrations and acoustics. This shows how military infrastructure can spur unexpected scientific insights.
items.summary_zh: 冷战时期用于追踪苏联潜艇的声学阵列意外为鲸类研究提供了数据，推动了对鲸群迁徙和声学行为的理解。这展示了军事基础设施在科学研究中的意外价值。

items.title_en: Digital Printing of Arabic: explaining the problem
items.title_zh: 阿拉伯文印刷的难题：问题解析
items.summary_en: The article outlines the core challenges of rendering Arabic text in digital printing, including contextual shaping, ligatures, bidirectional layout, and diacritics. It explains why Arabic typesetting requires sophisticated shaping engines to preserve correct forms.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了在数字印刷中呈现阿拉伯文时的独特挑战，包括字形的上下文变化、连字、双向排版、元音标记以及字体排版引擎的工作原理。还讨论了排版系统需要如何处理上下文与书法规范以呈现正确的字形。

items.title_en: Human Judgment as a Specification
items.title_zh: 将人类判断作为规范
items.summary_en: The piece argues that human judgments can serve as a specification for AI behavior, enabling scalable alignment by turning preferences into concrete constraints. It discusses practical implications for human-in-the-loop AI design.
items.summary_zh: 人类判断可以被用作 AI 行为的规范，将偏好转化为具体约束，从而实现可扩展的对齐。这一思路对人机协作型 AI 设计有重要启示。

items.title_en: Soccer Arcade Games Through the Years
items.title_zh: 足球街机游戏的历史演变
items.summary_en: Soccer arcade games have evolved from mechanical, coin-op machines to modern digital titles with licensed teams and physics-based gameplay. The piece traces the arc of arcade design across decades, highlighting how gameplay, accessibility, and nostalgia intersect with football culture as the sport grows globally.
items.summary_zh: 足球街机游戏经历了从机械装置到现代数字游戏的演变，涉及许可、玩法与物理仿真等方面的进步。文章追溯数十年的发展，强调游戏设计、易用性与怀旧情感如何与足球文化交织。它展示了街机在不同时代的硬件演进和玩家体验的变化。

items.title_en: Computed goto for efficient dispatch tables (2012)
items.title_zh: 用于高效派发表的计算 goto（2012）
items.summary_en: The post explains how computed goto can speed up dispatch tables in interpreters by reducing branches and improving cache locality. It’s a practical trick for building high-performance language runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解了计算 goto 如何通过减少分支预测失败并提升缓存局部性来加速解释器的派发表，是构建高性能语言运行时的实用技巧。

items.title_en: Show HN: Microcrad – Micrograd Reimplemented in C
items.title_zh: Show HN：Microcrad——用 C 语言重新实现的 Micrograd
items.summary_en: Microcrad is a C reimplementation of Micrograd, a tiny autograd library. The project demonstrates portability and performance benefits of a low-level autodiff toolkit and invites comparisons with Python-based originals.
items.summary_zh: Microcrad 是对 Micrograd 的 C 语言重新实现，展示了低级自动微分工具的可移植性与性能潜力，并与原有的 Python 实现进行对比。

items.title_en: S‑CURVES a field guide to technology adoption · 1825–2026
items.title_zh: S‑CURVES：1825–2026 的技术采用指南
items.summary_en: S‑CURVES offers a field guide to how technologies spread from adoption to maturity across two centuries. The work helps readers understand where a tech sits on its lifecycle and what signals predict adoption or displacement, guiding product strategy and policy.
items.summary_zh: S‑CURVES 提供了一个横跨两百年来的技术采用田野指南，帮助读者理解新技术在生命周期中的位置，以及预测采用与替代的信号，为产品策略与政策制定提供指引。

items.title_en: Mencius (2016)
items.title_zh: 孟子（2016）—— 一部分析《孟子》经典解读的学术著作
items.summary_en: Mencius (2016) is a scholarly work analyzing interpretations of the Confucian classic Mencius.
items.summary_zh: 孟子（2016）是一部分析《孟子》经典解读的学术著作。

items.title_en: Meet Nikolai Evreinov, the 19th century Nathan Fielder
items.title_zh: 遇见尼古拉·埃夫列诺夫：19世纪的 Nathan Fielder
items.summary_en: The piece profiles Nikolai Evreinov, a 19th-century theater innovator whose prankster, meta-theatrical stunts prefigure contemporary performance art and prank-based media. It draws parallels to a modern Nathan Fielder, showing how theatrical deception can critique society and reshape audience engagement.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍尼古拉·埃夫列诺夫，这位19世纪的戏剧革新者以其伪装与元剧场式的行为艺术先驱着称，与当代喜剧人 Nathan Fielder 风格相映成趣。通过对比，揭示戏剧欺骗如何对社会进行评论，并挑战观众的预期。

items.title_en: The Doctor Who Treats Patients with a Gaming Mouse
items.title_zh: 用游戏鼠标治疗患者的医生
items.summary_en: A physician uses a gaming mouse in patient care, illustrating how consumer hardware can influence medical workflows and assistive tech.
items.summary_zh: 一位医生在临床工作中使用游戏鼠标，展示消费级硬件在医疗工作流和辅助技术中的潜在应用与局限。
